diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,166 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class and type exports for Env, Context, HonoRequest, client types
+- Internal names noticed: Hono import from ./hono, type re-exports from ./types and ./context
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point re-exporting core classes and types for end users
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports Hono class and type interfaces for environment, context, request, and client inference
+
+## src/types.ts
+
+- Public surface: Env, Next, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, JSONRespondReturn, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for handlers, middleware, routes, and environment
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines all handler types, interfaces, value types, and request/response typing utilities
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Public surface: Hono class constructor accepting router options
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase constructor, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter instantiation
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Hono wrapper class that configures router with SmartRouter fallback
+- Copy-safe detail: Extends HonoBase with configurable router selection and SmartRouter as default
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: Hono class, #path private field, #notFoundHandler, errorHandler, #addRoute, #dispatch, #handleError, #clone
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class implementing routing, middleware, error handling, and fetch dispatch
+- Copy-safe detail: Core request dispatching logic with router integration, error handling, not-found handlers, and route management
+
+## src/context.ts
+
+- Public surface: Context class, execCtx getter, req getter, res getter, header, status, set, get, var, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, render, setLayout, setRenderer
+- Internal names noticed: #rawRequest, #req, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler, #preparedHeaders, #matchResult, #path
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request context wrapper holding environment bindings, execution context, response state, and response helpers
+- Copy-safe detail: Manages response lifecycle, headers, variables, layout rendering, and provides text/json/html/redirect response helpers
+
+## src/request.ts
+
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
+- Internal names noticed: #validatedData, #matchResult, #getDecodedParam, #getAllDecodedParams, #getParamValue, #cachedBody, cloneRawRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper providing param/query/header extraction and body parsing utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: Caches body parsing, decodes URL parameters, extracts request properties, and provides validated data access
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT exported symbol constant
+- Internal names noticed: Unique symbol for accessing match result from request
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Exports a unique symbol for internal match result access in HonoRequest
+- Copy-safe detail: Single symbol export for symbol-based property access pattern
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+
+- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData type, ParseBodyOptions
+- Internal names noticed: parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request bodies for form data with all/dot notation options
+- Copy-safe detail: Handles multipart and form-urlencoded bodies, supports array parsing and nested dot notation
+
+## src/compose.ts
+
+- Public surface: compose function returning composed middleware
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch inner function, index tracking, isError flag, context.error assignment
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Koa-style middleware composition with error and not-found handler support
+- Copy-safe detail: Chains middleware with dispatch pattern, tracks index to prevent double next calls, handles errors and not-found
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+
+- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error with res and status properties
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions type, getResponse method
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Custom HTTP exception for auth failures and fatal errors with response template
+- Copy-safe detail: Creates HTTP errors with status code and optional response body for consistent error handling
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+
+- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions
+- Internal names noticed: parseResponse, DetailedError re-export from ./utils
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client exports with hc factory and type inference utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: Central export point for client-side typing and the hc request builder function
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class, createProxy
+- Internal names noticed: proxyCallback, ClientRequestImpl, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, removeIndexString, replaceUrlProtocol, createProxy
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./utils/cookie, ./client/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request-proxying HTTP client using proxy-based API for fluent composition
+- Copy-safe detail: Builds request URLs with path params and query strings, merges request options, handles cookies, supports WebSocket connections
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+
+- Public surface: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: ExpandAllMethod, HonoURL, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, TypedURL, Callback, CallbackOptions, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, PickRoute, PickSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./hono-base, ./router, ./types, ./utils/types, ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English string: Complex type definitions for client-side request inference and URL building
+- Copy-safe detail: Type-level path traversal, URL building with protocol/host/port separation, response filtering by status code
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: isObject helper, fetchRP re-export from ./fetch-result-please
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: URL manipulation and merge utilities plus response parsing with typed inference
+- Copy-safe detail: Merges request options deeply, builds URL search params, validates responses and infers types
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+
+- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses set, jsonRegex, detectResponseType function
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch wrapper that detects response type and converts to parsed data
+- Copy-safe detail: Detects JSON vs text by content-type, handles null body responses, throws DetailedError for non-OK status codes
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: handle re-export from ./handler, fire type parameters
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter registering Hono app with addEventListener fetch
+- Copy-safe detail: Binds fetch to globalThis, registers fetch event listener for service worker environments
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+
+- Public surface: handle function, HandleOptions type
+- Internal names noticed: Handler type, HandleOptions with fetch default to globalThis.fetch.bind(globalThis)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Creates fetch event handler that responds to requests with Hono app plus fallback options
+- Copy-safe detail: Wraps app.fetch in respondWith, allows 404 fallback to custom fetch, passes event context to app
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript definitions for Service Worker FetchEvent interface
+- Copy-safe detail: Extends ExtendableEvent with Service Worker specific properties like clientId and respondWith
+
+## Path Inventory
+
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

This is a benchmark task to create a documentation file about the Honon core API. Let me break down what I need to do:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if missing
2. Read all 18 listed source files
3. Create a markdown file with specific format including:
   - Title: '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'
   - For each file: heading '## <file path>' with 5 bullet sections
   - Final section '## Path Inventory' with all file paths as bullets

Let me start by creating the directory and reading the files.
